scripts.dev: pnpm build:pollis-node:debug && concurrently -k -n vite,electron "pnpm --filter frontend dev" "wait-on -t 30000 tcp:5173 && pnpm --filter @pollis/electron start"
scripts.build:tauri: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then set -a; . .env.development; set +a; fi; pnpm tauri build'
scripts.build:tauri:linux: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then set -a; . .env.development; set +a; fi; pnpm tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu'
scripts.build:tauri:macos: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then set -a; . .env.development; set +a; fi; pnpm tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin'
scripts.build:tauri:windows: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then set -a; . .env.development; set +a; fi; pnpm tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc'
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm build:pollis-node:debug && pnpm build:electron && pnpm --filter frontend build && playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:ui: pnpm build:pollis-node:debug && pnpm build:electron && pnpm --filter frontend build && playwright test --ui
